## Summary

Describe the change and the reason for it.

## Risk

Describe the user-facing, security, compatibility, or release risk.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests or checks run locally are listed here.
- [ ] New or changed logic has unit coverage.
- [ ] Integration, e2e, or black-box coverage was added or is not applicable.
- [ ] Documentation was updated or is not applicable.
- [ ] Bundle-size impact was checked or is not applicable.

## Release And Security

- [ ] The target branch is correct.
- [ ] No secrets, generated artefacts, or local-only files are included.
- [ ] Package entry points, exports, or public APIs were reviewed if changed.
- [ ] Changelog or release notes were updated or are not applicable.
